mapper.insert: insert into dd_book_purchase_order (order_no, borrow_order_id, borrow_order_no, borrow_detail_id, member_id, member_card_no, member_name, order_type, payment_type, book_id, book_code, book_name, qty, unit_price, discount_price, receivable_amount, paid_amount, points_deduct, order_status, pay_time, remark, dept_id, create_staff_id, create_staff_name, update_staff_id, update_staff_name, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{borrowOrderId}, #{borrowOrderNo}, #{borrowDetailId}, #{memberId}, #{memberCardNo}, #{memberName}, #{orderType}, #{paymentType}, #{bookId}, #{bookCode}, #{bookName}, #{qty}, #{unitPrice}, #{discountPrice}, #{receivableAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{pointsDeduct}, #{orderStatus}, now(), #{remark}, #{deptId}, #{staffId}, #{staffName}, #{staffId}, #{staffName}, now())
